title: Elementary School Students Come Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
overview: High school student Subaru Hasegawa arrives at the Keishin Academy to coach the five members of its elementary school girls' basketball team.

title: A Little Girls Wish
overview: Subaru learns why he was really asked to coach the girls. While grappling with his own feelings about basketball, he has a chance meeting with Tomoka.

title: The Pass That Leads to Tomorrow
overview: By studying the strengths and weaknesses of each girl, Subaru devises a specialized training plan to prepare them for their big game on Sunday.

title: Wish Upon Subaru
overview: With the score close, the pressure's on for the girls' basketball team to eke out a win against the boys using the techniques they practiced.

title: Hard to Light
overview: At a sleep-away basketball training session, the girls discover that Takenaka will be on their team in an upcoming game between classrooms at school.

title: Iron Master
overview: As the session continues, Takenaka has something important to say to Maho. Later, Takenaka and Hina disappear, and the others go to investigate.

title: In Love With Your Bud
overview: Subaru's friends are suspicious about his recent behavior. Airi reveals that she's afraid of water and is worried about the upcoming swimming class.

title: The Stairs to Reincarnation
overview: Aoi confronts Subaru, accusing him of sacrificing his grades and his dream of restarting his own school basketball team for the sake of the girls.

title: The Sidelong Sprint to Freedom
overview: Maho invites everyone to her beach house for a relaxing day of food and play. Hina gets to spend some special time with her sister, Kagetsu.

title: Tragedy of the Beautiful Star
overview: Aoi and Subaru go with the team to another sleepaway camp for their first basketball experience away from school. The camp is not what they expected.

title: Five Bridges
overview: The team continues to train and enjoy the great outdoors, and after some heartfelt talk, a five-on-five match is arranged against the Suzuridani team.

title: My Dream Is Your Dream
overview: The team shows off the results of all their hard work and determination in their match against the Suzuridani team as Subaru and Aoi look on.

title: Innocent World!
overview: Tomoka's father forbids her from attending the upcoming festival, and does not approve of her playing basketball. Subaru offers to speak with him.

title: Flying Battle!
overview: Tomoka has a one-on-one match with Mimi. Mimi and Kagetsu go to Takenaka for help to form a new team of 5th graders to play against the 6th graders.

title: Paradigm Ginga
overview: The 5th graders show off the results of their talent and training under Subaru's father in an earnest match against the 6th grade team.

title: The Stupid Boy
overview: As the 6th graders prepare to practice, Subaru encounters his old rival who coaches a middle school team. He challenges them to a three-on-three game.

title: Overnight Sensation!
overview: Subaru, Airi, and Tomoka train hard for their rematch against Ryuichi's team with coaching from Banri, Takenaka, and most importantly, each other.

title: Aoi Wins?
overview: Subaru and Aoi win a trip for two to Kyoto that coincidentally falls on the same dates as the 6th graders' school field trip to the city.

title: Win, again?
overview: Maho's father invites Subaru and the team to a party and asks them if there is anything he can do for them. After thinking a moment, Subaru responds.

title: I Wish with You
overview: The 5th and 6th grade teams face off in an exciting match in which they keep adjusting their strategies to get ahead as their coaches cheer them on.

title: Don't Wanna Cry
overview: Saki and Masami get into a culinary duel at a food fair, assisted by their respective teams, when they suddenly encounter Rena from Suzuridani.

title: Wanna Be A Playmaker
overview: The 5th and 6th graders join up to train each other for an upcoming tournament, where the Suzuridani team looks forward to their match together.

title: Dearests
overview: In an emotional match between Keishin and Suzuridani at the tournament, the 5th graders are fired up at the chance to prove themselves against Rena.

title: Because You're Here, Tomoka
overview: The game goes into overtime, and the 6th grade team gets substituted in to show what they can do. But Suzuridani promises to fight back, too.
